idea-plugin.name: Jira Companion
idea-plugin.description:
Keep Jira Cloud next to your code: look up issues, read descriptions and comments, and run searches from a tool window—without living in the browser.

  • Issue detail — summary, status, type, assignee, rendered description, comments
  • Search — JQL, saved filters, quick scopes, issue list with open-in-browser and copy key
  • Actions — assign to me, watch / unwatch, add comments (REST API v3)
  • Git (optional) — fill issue key from the current branch; create and checkout a branch from the loaded issue
  • Notifications-style feed — tab with simple JQL-based feeds and optional auto-refresh

Configure your site URL, Atlassian email, and API token under Settings | Tools | Jira Companion. The API token is stored using the IDE credential store.

Compatibility: IntelliJ Platform 2024.1+ (build 241), including Android Studio Koala 2024.1.x and newer. Requires network access to your Jira site.
